raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ehrſchſti / nedß Dadſis kas
ſahp / no wiſſeem kas apkahrt
tecm irr/ kas tohs dsenna/ un tee
fajuttihs / ka es tas KUngs
KUNGS eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUngs
KUNGS : Kad es Iſraëta
Namnu fapulzinaschu no teem
Landiu / ſtarp kurxeem tee irr
iſkaititi/ un es winnu Starpâ
ſwehtihſs tapſchu preekſch to Pa-
ganu Azzim / tad tee dſihwohs
fanâ Seinnê / ko es mannaim
Kalpain Jehkabaim eſmu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee dſihwohs tur droh-
fbi/ un uſtaufihs Nammus/ un
Debſtihs Wihna-Dahrsus. Tee-
ſcham / tee dſihwohs Drohſchi /
kad es Teefas neﬀſichu prett wiſ-
feem/ kas tohs irr dſinnufschi/ ao
teein/ kas apkahrt winneem irr/
un tee fajuttihs/ ka es eſmu tas
KUNGS winnu Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIX. Aodalla.
Ezekiels fohti bahrgi draude Warau to Nebi-
niau eeſch Egiptes: 1. Ka winnam ar
wiſu ſawu Walfsibn / Nebukad Nezaram
buhs Rohkâ dohtam tapt/ tapehz ka wiꞥſch
ne uſtizzigi prett Iſraëta Namnu turrejees:
6/18. Tomehr pehz 40 Gaddeem buhs
teem Egiptereem atkai fapulzetees/ un par
masu Walstibu buht: 13. etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Efmita Gaddâ/ defmi-
ta Mehnefi/ diwipadeſ-
mita Deena tahs Meh-
nes/ notikte ta KUNga Wahrdś
us man/kas fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ greeſ-
tawu Waigu prett Warau to
Egiptes Rehninau / un fluddina
prett winau/ un prett wiſſu E-
gipti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ruuna un fakki: Ta-
ka tas KUngs KUNGS :
gribbu prett tewi ak Warauſs
Egiptes Rehniasch/ tu leels Ji-
ras Swehrs! kas fawu U-
Widdû gull/ kasfakka : Man
Uppe man preederr/ un eß efr
to preekſch fewim darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es liſchn wee-
Makschkeri tawa Paschohſti/ i-
liſchn tawas Uppes Siwis p-
taweem Swihneem peelipt/
iswilſchn tewi no tawu Up-
Widdug/ un wiſſahin Siwi-
tawu Upju buhs pee tawe-
Swihneem peelipt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es atstabſchu ten-
Tukſneſi/ tevi/ un wiſſas tawa-
Uppes Siwis/ tew buhs Lauf-
Wirfu krist/ tu ne tapsi fakraht
nedß fapuizinahts; Es eſmu te-
wi teem Swehreem wirs Gem-
mes/ un teem Putneem appafſ-
Debbes par Barribu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Egiptes Gedſih-
wotaji fajuttihs / ka es ta-
KUNGS eſmu/ tapehz ka tee-
tawu Iſraëta Namnam weene-
Needru Stohbris irr bijufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee tewi pee tawas
Rohkas fatwehre/ tad eſſi tu fa-
luhſis / un teem tohs Sahnus
ſchkehſis/ un kad tee ue tewi at-
speedahs/ tad eſſi tu luhſis/ un
tohs zaar Gurneem duhrie.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fakka tas KUngs
KUNGS : Redſi/ Es weddychu
pahr tewi to Sobhinn/ un iſdel-
deschu no tewim Zilwekus un
Lohpus.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
